import nl.tsym.tackbox.report.Report;

// JV006: Report.error is a backend capture, so reporting the caught AND
// rethrowing it double-reports (the upstream handler captures it again). Proves
// the Report origin is wired into captures(), not only capturesOrPrints().
class ReportDoubleCapture {
    void m() throws Exception {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV006"
            Report.error("boom", e, null, "area.key");
            throw e;
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
